import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      let s = n * (n + 1) / 2
      println("sum=#{s}")
    when None
      println("sum=0")
    end
  when None
    println("sum=0")
  end
end
